tasting_rooms.name: Clos Mogador
tasting_rooms.address: Camino Manyetes s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided cellar visit with tasting by appointment; contact winery for current rates
tasting_rooms.description: Rene Barbier's original 1989 revival estate on llicorella slate terraces above Gratallops; tasting visits explore the Manyetes vineyards and the historic cellar.

tasting_rooms.name: Alvaro Palacios Winery
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera de Gratallops a la Vilella Baixa km 1, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Visits strictly by appointment; contact via website
tasting_rooms.description: Home of Finca Dofi and L'Ermita, Alvaro Palacios's Gratallops cellar offers appointment-only tours of the llicorella terraces and the barrel room.

verified.address_quoted: Carretera de Gratallops a la Vilella Baixa km 1, Gratallops

tasting_rooms.name: Mas Martinet
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera Falset-Gratallops km 5, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Appointment-only guided visits with tasting; details via email
tasting_rooms.description: Sara Perez's family estate on the Falset-Gratallops road; winery visits combine llicorella terrace walks with tasting of Clos Martinet and the Camino range.

tasting_rooms.name: Costers del Siurana (Clos de l'Obac)
tasting_rooms.address: Camino de la Bassa s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided vineyard and cellar tour with tasting by appointment; rates on request
tasting_rooms.description: Carles Pastrana's Gratallops estate, one of the 1989 founding five; tours take in the Obac terraces, the barrel cellar and a tasting of Miserere and Clos de l'Obac.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de la Bassa s/n, Gratallops

tasting_rooms.name: Celler Val Llach
tasting_rooms.address: Carrer de la Font 38, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar visit with tasting by appointment; fees on inquiry
tasting_rooms.description: Founded by musician Lluis Llach and Enric Costa, this Porrera cellar champions old-vine Carinena; visits include the village cellar and a tasting of Embruix and Val Llach.

tasting_rooms.name: Mas Doix
tasting_rooms.pricing: Private guided tasting by appointment; contact bodega directly
tasting_rooms.description: Llicorella-terrace estate in Poboleda tended by the Doix family; its Salanques and Mas Doix labels draw from vines over 100 years old.

tasting_rooms.name: Cellers Cecilio
tasting_rooms.pricing: Cellar visit and tasting in the historic village cellar; by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: Historic family cellar in the heart of Gratallops village with stone surroundings and Garnacha-dominant Priorat in a traditional village setting.

tasting_rooms.name: Cooperativa Falset Marca (Etim)
tasting_rooms.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour of the 1919 modernist cooperative building with tasting; walk-in welcome during opening hours
tasting_rooms.description: Cesar Martinell-designed 1919 cooperative in Falset producing the Etim range; its modernist wine-cathedral architecture is as compelling as the Garnacha inside.

tasting_rooms.name: Bodega Scala Dei
tasting_rooms.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour of the historic winery adjacent to the Cartoixa ruins with tasting; open most days, reservation recommended
tasting_rooms.description: Founded 1973 next to the Cartoixa d'Escaladei ruins; one of Priorat's earliest modern wineries with a tasting programme at the original Carthusian vine site.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

tasting_rooms.name: Clos Erasmus
tasting_rooms.address: Carrer de l'Era 7, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Private visits by appointment only; very limited capacity
tasting_rooms.description: Daphne Glorian's boutique Gratallops estate and one of the original five from 1989; tiny quantities of Clos Erasmus and Laurel produced in the village cellar.

tasting_rooms.name: Celler El Masroig
tasting_rooms.address: Carrer Sant Antoni 11, 43736 El Masroig, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Group tastings and visits by appointment; cooperative pricing
tasting_rooms.description: El Masroig cooperative offering tastings of its Les Sorts and Sola Fred range from Montsant terraces along the southern DOQ Priorat boundary.

tasting_rooms.name: Torres Salmos
tasting_rooms.address: Camino de la Vilella s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Visits as part of Torres enoturismo programme; booking via Torres website
tasting_rooms.description: The Torres family Priorat project; Salmos winery visits can be arranged through Torres enoturismo, combining llicorella terraces with the Salmos tasting portfolio.

verified.address_quoted: Camino de la Vilella s/n, Gratallops

tasting_rooms.name: Venus la Universal
tasting_rooms.address: Carrer de Santa Creu 8, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting by appointment; contact via website
tasting_rooms.description: Sara Perez and Rene Barbier Jr's Falset project on DO Montsant with a natural-winemaking approach; old-vine Garnacha and Carinena at accessible price points.

tasting_rooms.name: Clos Galena
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera de Gratallops s/n, 43737 Gratallops, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided winery and vineyard visits by appointment; rates on inquiry
tasting_rooms.description: Family winery run by Marc Ribo near Gratallops producing layered DOQ Priorat from old-vine llicorella terraces; tours focus on sustainable viticulture.

tasting_rooms.name: Mas den Brunell
tasting_rooms.address: Carretera T-702 km 4.5, 43739 El Lloar, Tarragona, Spain
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting visits by appointment; contact bodega directly
tasting_rooms.description: El Lloar estate on DOQ Priorat terraces producing a mineral single-village style from llicorella and slate soils; intimate tasting by appointment.
